question: Will there be a red card in the 2026 UEFA Champions League final?
reason: UEFA Champions League finals rarely feature red cards, with only one instance in the past decade.
evidence: The 2016 final between Real Madrid and Atlético Madrid had no red cards. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2016_UEFA_Champions_League_final?utm_source=openai))
The 2019 final between Tottenham Hotspur and Liverpool also had no red cards. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2019_UEFA_Champions_League_final?utm_source=openai))

The 2025 final between Paris Saint-Germain and Inter Milan ended with a 5-0 scoreline and no red cards. ([es.uefa.com](https://es.uefa.com/uefachampionsleague/news/0252-0e98c715bb79-dea77f56e2bd-1000--champions-league-final-records-and-statistics/?utm_source=openai))
searchQueries: red card statistics in UEFA Champions League finals
